title: anthemis abrotanifolia subsp. panachaica
intro: Anthemis abrotanifolia subsp. panachaica, also known as the Panachaica Chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis abrotanifolia plant, a type of daisy-like flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The Panachaica Chamomile is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, soothing digestive issues, and reducing anxiety. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Anthemis abrotanifolia subsp. panachaica can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
